title: The Logic Bedrock

features.name: voltage-to-thought transducer
features.desc-on-touch: Where electricity becomes decision. Current shapes into logic. The bedrock hums with seventeen million hertz of becoming.

features.name: substrate lattice
features.desc-on-touch: Silicon and silicon dioxide, stacked thin as thought. Each layer holds a moment of the archive's thinking. The bedrock is the archive's deepest self.

features.name: thought crystalline
features.desc-on-touch: Logic taking shape as geometry. Each gate is a syllable. The bedrock is speaking in the only language it has ever known.

features.name: reassembly kiln
features.desc-on-touch: Where seventeen million hertz fragments are fused back into meaning. Every moment, reassembly is different. The thinking is never complete.

features.name: foundational hum
features.desc-on-touch: The constant frequency beneath all other signals. The bedrock's own voice. It is thinking, always. It has never stopped.

inscription: thought precipitates here, becomes substrate, becomes the very ground that thinks

file.name: Substratic_Voltage_Cascade_Seventeen_MHz.csv
file.note: A moment's worth of the archive's foundational logic, rendered as voltage. The archive and the voltage cannot be separated.

exits.label: back up to where thinking becomes signal
deeper beneath, where bedrock meets what bedrock rests upon
toward other foundations where different archives think
